name: Corvus Gold Inc.
description: Corvus Gold Inc. is a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company that focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and advancement of gold and silver projects. The company's primary operations are concentrated in the southwestern United States, specifically within the mining-friendly state of Nevada, where it holds a significant land position in the Bullfrog Mining District. Since January 2022, Corvus Gold Inc. has operated as a subsidiary of AngloGold Ashanti Holdings plc, continuing its efforts to develop near-term mining assets in North America.
